top_signals.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Thailand Looks to Invest in US LNG Projects to Secure Supply
top_signals.summary: Thailand is considering investments in US liquefied natural gas export projects, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Southeast Asian importer of the fuel looks to shore up its energy security needs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
